speaker: speaker2
text: Hi , Mr . Smith . This is Mary . Is Jenny there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , I ’ m afraid not , Mary . May I take a message for her ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , please tell her that band practice has been moved to Tuesday night at eight thirty .

speaker: speaker1
text: O . K . No problem . Anything else ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , but if she has any questions , she can call me at 555-2345 .

speaker: speaker1
text: All right , I ’ ll leave her the message , Mary . Thanks for calling .
